name: NamedParametersEventArgs
summary: Dictionary style class used for named callbacks from C++ -> .NET

constructors.name: NamedParametersEventArgs
constructors.summary: Construct a new named parameter even args. You should dispose this class when you are done with it

methods.signature: public void Dispose()
methods.summary: Dispose native resources

methods.summary: Finalizer in case Dispose wasn't called
